'''âsh-g-d-th''' ('''kashagdethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hoddle|hoddle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-g-d-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hoddle|hoddle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-g-d-th
|-
! Lemma
| kashagdethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishagdethoko|thishagdethoko]] || [[word:jishagdethoko|jishagdethoko]] || [[word:shishagdethoko|shishagdethoko]] || [[word:kishagdethoko|kishagdethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushagdethoko|thuthushagdethoko]] || [[word:jujushagdethoko|jujushagdethoko]] || [[word:shushushagdethoko|shushushagdethoko]] || [[word:kukushagdethoko|kukushagdethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
